patch.summary: Configure the API.Controllers.DTOs.Chapter cut-off for API.Schema.SeriesContext.Series

428.description: API.Controllers.DTOs.Chapter is not linked to API.MangaConnectors.SeriesSource yet. Search for API.Controllers.DTOs.Chapter on API.MangaConnectors.SeriesSource first (to create a API.Controllers.DTOs.SourceId`1).

put.summary:
Manually assigns a volume number to a API.Schema.SeriesContext.Chapter.
Passing null clears the volume assignment and confidence.

requestBody.description: Volume number to assign (null to clear)

get.summary:
Returns a 200×300 JPEG preview thumbnail of the first page of the chapter archive.
The thumbnail is generated lazily and cached at `{AppData}/previews/{chapter.Key}.jpg`.

404.description: Chapter not found, archive unreadable, no images in archive, or chapter is bundled

get.summary:
Returns a dashboard of manga with unresolved chapters or missing files.
Unresolved: Downloaded == true && VolumeNumber == null.
Missing: Downloaded == true && FileName == null.
Only manga with FileLibraryId != null are included.

200.description: Dashboard result; manga list may be empty

post.summary: Removes all API.Schema.SeriesContext.Series not marked for Download on any !:SeriesSource
Removes all API.Schema.ActionsContext.ActionRecord
Queues a API.Workers.MaintenanceWorkers.CleanupOrphanedFilesWorker to remove files from the library that are not tracked in the database.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If true, only log what would be deleted without actually deleting it.

post.summary: Queues a API.Workers.MaintenanceWorkers.ResolveMissingVolumesWorker to guess or resolve volume numbers for downloaded chapters.
Queues a API.Workers.MaintenanceWorkers.SyncChapterFileNamesWorker to rename chapter files where the stored filename no longer matches the current naming scheme.
Clears all chapter volume numbers and queues a API.Workers.MaintenanceWorkers.ResolveMissingVolumesWorker to re-resolve them from scratch.

200.description: Volumes cleared and resolve worker queued

Stores the layout preference and returns a reorganize preview using the new layout.
Does NOT execute any file moves.

200.description: Layout stored; response includes reorganize preview with new layout paths

post.summary:
Bulk-assigns chapter numbers to volume numbers for a manga.
Chapters not found are listed in the response; the request is not failed.
Also marks MetadataSource as Manual/Confirmed on the manga.

200.description: Assignment applied; returns count of applied and list of not-found chapter numbers

chapterNamingScheme.description:
Placeholders:
%M Obj Name
%V Volume
%C Chapter
%T Title
%A Author (first in list)
%I Chapter Internal ID

disabledConnectors.description:
Names of API.MangaConnectors.SeriesSource instances that have been explicitly disabled.
Connectors absent from this set are considered enabled (opt-out model).

corsAllowedOrigins.description:
Origins permitted for browser CORS requests. Empty (the default) preserves the historical
"allow any origin" behaviour; populate it to restrict the API to specific frontends.

syncedIndexers.description: Indexers Prowlarr has pushed/synced into Kenku (source of truth lives in Prowlarr).

indexerComicCategories.description: Comic category IDs applied to indexer searches. Default 8000 = Comics (Newznab convention).

apiKey.description: API key Prowlarr uses to authenticate against Kenku's Mylar-emulating application endpoint.

downloadClients.description: User-configurable download clients. The lowest-Priority enabled client is used.

metronUsername.description: Metron account username (HTTP Basic auth). Empty disables Metron lookups.

baseUrl.description: The Url of the Library instance

ManualIndexerConfig.description: A manually-configured Torznab/Newznab indexer (name + endpoint + key + categories).

coverUrl.description: Url to the cover if available

MetadataSourceCandidate.description: A scored metadata candidate for linking to a local Series.

sourceIds.description: Ids of the Series on MangaConnectors

coverUrl.description: External cover image URL from the connector

fileLibraryId.description: Id of the Library the Series gets downloaded to

name.description: The Name of the Notification Connector

httpMethod.description: The HTTP Request Method to use for notifications

body.description: The Request Body to use to send notifications

headers.description: The Request Headers to use to send notifications

PatchChapterRecord.description: Request body for updating mutable metadata on a Chapter

refreshLibraryWhileDownloadingEveryMinut.description: When API.Workers.LibraryRefreshSetting.WhileDownloading is selected, update the time between refreshes

ReorganizeJobResult.description: Result returned after queuing a reorganize job.

ReorganizePreviewResult.description: Dry-run diff for a reorganize operation.

ignoreChaptersBefore.description: Chapter cutoff for Downloads (Chapters before this will not be downloaded)

sourceIds.description: Ids of the Series on MangaConnectors

coverUrl.description: External cover image URL from the connector

fileLibraryId.description: Id of the Library the Series gets downloaded to

enabled.description: Whether Connector is used for Searches and Downloads

objId.description: ID of the Object on the connector site

websiteUrl.description: Website Link for reference, if any

useForDownload.description: Whether this Link is used for downloads

SetMetronRecord.description: Metron (metron.cloud) account credentials for metadata lookups.

UnbundleJobResult.description: Result returned when an unbundle job is queued.

UnresolvedMangaEntry.description: Entry for a manga with unresolved chapters or missing files.

VolumeEntry.description: One volume with its chapter list.

dependencies.description: Workers this worker depends on having ran.

missingDependencies.description: Workers that have not yet ran, that need to run for this Worker to run.
